## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the reason for the change.

## Validation

List the commands, fixtures, and platforms used to validate the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover success, failure, and zero-row behavior as applicable.
- [ ] Default tests are deterministic and do not require network access.
- [ ] Live checks, if any, are in `test-live-*.R`, bounded, and avoid full-graph counts.
- [ ] Public behavior, serialized contracts, and `NEWS.md` are updated as needed.
- [ ] New external URLs follow the request-safety and redirect policy.
- [ ] No credentials, private endpoints, or sensitive payloads are committed.
- [ ] Architecture decisions are recorded when the change establishes a durable contract.
